description_long: This apartment building features a rustic, Mediterranean-style facade with tan stucco walls partially covered in green climbing ivy. The structure consists of two main sections: a taller, narrow tower with four stories and a shorter, wider section with two stories, both topped with traditional terracotta-tiled gable roofs. The front is adorned with black shutters, wrought iron balconies, and flower boxes beneath several windows, adding to its old-world charm. The ground floor has multiple arched doorways and shopfronts, each with signage and lantern-style lighting fixtures. The side and rear walls are mostly plain, with the left side painted a solid red and the right side showing more ivy growth. The building sits on a paved stone base, suggesting it is designed for placement along a street or plaza in an urban environment.
description: A Mediterranean-style apartment building with tan stucco walls, terracotta roofs, ivy, and wrought iron balconies. The facade features arched doorways, black shutters, and flower boxes, evoking a charming, old-world urban atmosphere.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main facade with arched entrances, black shutters, balconies, flower boxes, and extensive ivy on the walls.
description_view_1: The right side view reveals a tall, plain wall with significant ivy coverage and no windows or doors.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a solid red wall with no windows or architectural details, highlighting the building's back side.
description_view_3: The left side view shows a plain tan wall with minimal features, a balcony on the upper floor, and the edge of the paved base.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are symmetrically arranged in vertical columns, with evenly spaced groupings on each floor and black shutters flanking most windows on the front facade.
